title_original: Quantum Tycoon, an educational video game for discovering quantum computing
summary_original: The Institute of Cosmos Sciences and the Institute of Nanoscience and Nanotechnology at the University of Barcelona have launched Quantum Tycoon, a free educational video game available on Google Play. Developed by students Gabriel Linares and Guillem Pérez under the supervision of researchers Bruno Julià and Carles Calero, the app enables users to manage a quantum computing company, utilizing real algorithms like Grover’s algorithm. Quantum Tycoon aims to introduce quantum computing concepts through an interactive simulation and strategy environment. Professor Bruno Julià describes it as “a qualitative leap forward in our commitment to rigorously disseminating” quantum science. The launch reflects the University of Barcelona’s ongoing efforts to make complex scientific topics accessible to the broader public.
